info.title: ACSES CDN & API
info.description:
REST API for the ACSES department website. Provides CRUD operations for website content management and serves static files.

**Authentication:** All write operations (POST, PUT, DELETE) require a JWT token obtained from `/api/auth/login`. Pass it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

**Pagination:** Routes marked with pagination support accept `?page=1&limit=20` query parameters and return `{ items, total, page, limit }`.

User.description: Password is never returned in responses.

get.description: Returns server status. Use this to check if the server is running.

post.description: Authenticate with username and password. Returns a JWT token valid for 8 hours. Rate limited to 10 attempts per 15 minutes.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of events, sorted by most recent first.
Public endpoint. Only returns projects with `status: 'approved'`.

post.description: Public endpoint. Submitted projects default to `status: 'pending'` and require admin approval.

get.description: Returns all projects including pending. Admin can approve by updating `status` to `'approved'`.

put.description: Set `{ "status": "approved" }` to approve a pending project.

get.description: Returns the single home document with president message, HOD message, and statistics.

put.description: Replaces the entire home document atomically.

get.description: Passwords are never included in the response.

post.description: Password is hashed with bcrypt before storage. Returns 409 if username already exists.

put.description: If a new password is provided, it will be re-hashed.
